failures.description: The agent selected the wrong item as the cheapest available Electric Kettle, choosing the most expensive listed item instead of the lowest-priced item returned by the catalog search.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and showed the results sorted by ascending price. The first item, 1240311797, had the lowest price at $137.17. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer using item 2243454707 at $164.46, which contradicts the tool output. This is not an invalid tool call or underspecified intent; it is incorrect reasoning over the returned evidence.
